overview.heading: Overview
overview.description_addPrompt: Add X, GitHub or GitLab accounts to start tracking
overview.noAccounts: No accounts configured — add one to see it here
overview.xNoAccounts: No X accounts configured. Add one in the X page to see analytics.
overview.githubNoAccounts: No GitHub accounts configured. Add one in the GitHub page to see stats.

charts.tweetActivityDesc: Daily tweet count over the last 6 months
charts.dailyEngagementDesc: Total likes and retweets per day
charts.topLikedDesc: Your most popular tweets by likes
charts.noTweetData: No tweet activity data yet. Add an X account and fetch tweets to populate this chart.
charts.noEngagementData: No engagement data yet. Add an X account and fetch tweets to populate this chart.
charts.noTweets: No tweets yet. Add an X account and fetch tweets to see your top content here.

x.heading: X (Twitter)
x.description: Track tweets, engagement, and follower growth
x.emptyState: No X accounts yet. Add an account to start tracking tweets, engagement rates, and follower growth across all your X accounts.

github.heading: GitHub
github.emptyState: No GitHub accounts yet. Add an account to see repository stats, stars, fork counts, language distribution, and contribution heatmaps.

preview.starsDesc: Track which repos are most popular
preview.forksDesc: Monitor fork counts and open issues

githubDetail.noPinnedRepos: No pinned repos yet. Use Manage to pin repos you want to track.
githubDetail.reposDesc: Click any repo for detailed insights: star history, traffic, referrers, releases
githubDetail.reposDescPinned: Showing pinned repos. Use Manage to add or remove repos.
githubDetail.contributionDesc: Your GitHub contribution activity this year
githubDetail.noContributionData: No contribution data. Add a GitHub PAT to fetch contributions.
githubDetail.noDataDesc: Trigger a fetch from the detail page to retrieve data.

repoDetail.starHistoryDesc: Star count over time (recorded per fetch)
repoDetail.gitClonesDesc: Daily clone counts (data accumulates with each fetch)
repoDetail.visitorsDesc: Daily page view counts (data accumulates with each fetch)
repoDetail.onlyOneDataPoint: Only one data point. Run more fetches to build a star history.
repoDetail.noStarHistory: No star history yet. Data is recorded with each fetch.
repoDetail.noCloneData: No clone data. Requires a classic PAT with repo scope (fine-grained tokens don't support traffic API).
repoDetail.noTrafficData: No traffic data. Requires a classic PAT with repo scope (fine-grained tokens don't support traffic API).
repoDetail.noReferrerData: No referrer data yet. More data will appear after additional fetches.
repoDetail.noPopularContent: No popular content data yet. More data will appear after additional fetches.
repoDetail.noReleases: No releases found. Requires a classic PAT with repo scope.

gitlab.heading: GitLab
gitlab.emptyState: No GitLab accounts yet. Add an account to see project stats, stars, fork counts, language distribution, and activity data.

preview.starsDesc: Track which projects are most popular
preview.forksDesc: Monitor fork counts and open issues

gitlabDetail.noPinnedProjects: No pinned projects yet. Use Manage to pin projects you want to track.
gitlabDetail.projectsDesc: Click any project for detailed insights: star history and releases
gitlabDetail.projectsDescPinned: Showing pinned projects. Use Manage to add or remove projects.
gitlabDetail.contributionDesc: Push events from the events API
gitlabDetail.noContributionData: No activity data. Add a GitLab PAT to fetch events.
gitlabDetail.noDataDesc: Trigger a fetch from the detail page to retrieve data.

projectDetail.starHistoryDesc: Star count over time (recorded per fetch)
projectDetail.onlyOneDataPoint: Only one data point. Run more fetches to build a star history.
projectDetail.noStarHistory: No star history yet. Data is recorded with each fetch.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters

addAccountForm.title: Add Account
addAccountForm.helpInstanceUrl: Leave blank for gitlab.com, or enter your self-hosted instance URL
addAccountForm.helpGithub: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) with repo scope. Fine-grained tokens don't support traffic data.
addAccountForm.helpGitlab: GitLab Personal Access Token with read_api, read_user, and read_repository scopes.
addAccountForm.helpReddit: OAuth refresh token from a script app. Set REDDIT_CLIENT_ID and REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET in .env.
addAccountForm.helpRedditPublic: Get your loid cookie from Reddit (F12 > Application > Cookies > loid). Paste the value here. Fetches karma, posts, and comments without OAuth.
addAccountForm.helpX: From X.com cookies → auth_token. Keep this private.
addAccountForm.howToCreateToken: Create a classic token with pre-selected scopes →

redditGuide.title: How to set up Reddit:
redditGuide.step4: Note the client ID (under app name) and secret
redditGuide.step5: Put REDDIT_CLIENT_ID and REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET in your .env file
redditGuide.fieldToken: Token: use your Reddit account password as the refresh token (Reddit's script app OAuth uses password grant)

redditPublicGuide.title: Public access (no setup required)
redditPublicGuide.step3: Paste it in the Token field on the left
redditPublicGuide.step4: Click "Add Account" — karma, posts, and comments will be fetched

githubGuide.title: How to set up GitHub:
githubGuide.step3: Paste it in the Token field on the left

gitlabGuide.title: How to set up GitLab:
gitlabGuide.step4: Paste it in the Token field on the left

xGuide.title: How to set up X (Twitter):
xGuide.step3: Copy the auth_token value and paste it on the left

editAccountForm.title: Edit Account
editAccountForm.tokenHint: Leave blank to keep the current token.

reddit.heading: Reddit
reddit.emptyState: No Reddit accounts yet. Add an account to see post stats, karma, comment activity.

preview.karmaDesc: Monitor post and comment karma over time
preview.postsDesc: Track post score and comment counts

redditDetail.noPosts: No posts yet. Trigger a fetch to retrieve data.
redditDetail.noComments: No comments yet. Trigger a fetch to retrieve data.
redditDetail.noDataDesc: Trigger a fetch from the detail page to retrieve data.

admin.heading: User Management
admin.deleteUserDesc: This action cannot be undone. All associated data will be deleted.
admin.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
